title: Red Teaming LLM Applications
description: Hands-on session covering prompt injection, jailbreak testing, and defense-in-depth for LLM-backed applications.

title: Threat Modeling for AI Systems
description: A practical framework for threat-modeling AI-backed features before they ship.

title: Monthly Meetup — AI Security Roundup
description: Open floor, lightning talks, and networking with the Bangalore chapter.

title: CTF Night — Jailbreak the Model
description: Teams compete to break a deliberately vulnerable LLM application. Prizes for the top three.
